data.description: 2025 half-year financial report for Planisware now available.
European banks weather a stress test that simulates trade shock.

data.title: Invesco closed-end funds declared dividends, with key dates: ex-date 8/18/2025, payable date 8/29/2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, the Board of Trustees for the Invesco closed-end funds announced dividends for their shareholders. The dividends are set to be paid on August 29, 2025, for those holding shares as of the record date, which is also August 18, 2025. The reinvest date is August 29, 2025, and the ex-date is set for August 18, 2025. Shareholders of the mentioned closed-end management investment company can expect monthly payouts as per the schedule provided.

data.title: Cineverse partners with Moviefone to bring back phone line, fans can call 1-802-377-FILM to hear Peter Dinklage's voice as The Toxic Avenger.
data.description: Popular movie companies have come together to revive the Moviefone phone line, inviting fans to dial 1-802-377-FILM to engage with the latest cinema releases before the highly anticipated August 29 premiere. This initiative signifies the return of a beloved movie resource and is led by Cineverse (Nasdaq: CNVS), a cutting-edge entertainment studio based in Los Angeles.

data.title: PFRPA and Delta Dental team up to enhance dental benefits for retired NFL players & spouses, announced on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: A partnership between the Pro Football Retired Players Association (PFRPA) and Delta Dental was revealed today in Arlington, Virginia on August 1, 2025. PFRPA, a renowned national organization dedicated to creating initiatives and benefits for retired NFL players, disclosed the collaboration with Delta Dental, the top dental insurance provider in the country.

data.title: Rantizo sells drone spray ops to invest group, rebrands as American Autonomy, Inc. - Iowa City, Aug. 1, 2025.#AgTech
data.description: Today in Iowa City, Iowa, on August 1, 2025, Rantizo, Inc. revealed the sale of its drone spraying operations division to a dedicated investment group proficient in agricultural technology and aerial application services. This strategic move brings a notable change for Rantizo as it transitions to new ownership.

data.title: Mercury Insurance advises homeowners to prepare for extreme weather as events become more costly nationwide.
data.description: Mercury Insurance is urging homeowners to take preventative measures to safeguard their properties, finances, and well-being as severe weather incidents grow more expensive nationwide. This advice comes amidst heightened concern over escalating climate-related damages.

data.title: MrBeast and Mark Rober launch #TeamWater campaign to raise $40 million, providing clean water to 2 million worldwide.
data.description: Internet personalities Jimmy Donaldson, also known as MrBeast, and Mark Rober have introduced #TeamWater, a project driven by creators to collect $40 million by August 31. The aim is to offer clean water to 2 million individuals across the globe for an extended duration. The campaign was initiated in New York on August 1, 2025.

data.title: ClassLink introduces AppTrack to help education leaders review new edtech requests efficiently, addressing the challenge of managing a high volume of requests.
data.description: In Clifton, New Jersey on August 1, 2025, a prominent company in the education sector, ClassLink, unveiled AppTrack, their latest offering in Identity and Access Management solutions. The introduction of AppTrack comes at a time when the company faces a continuous influx of new application requests throughout the year, surpassing their team's capacity for evaluation. This challenge highlights the necessity for an efficient system to manage the influx of requests.

data.title: The Florida Aquarium unveils The Tide Pool, a 60-ft long 4,000-gallon cold-water touch habitat with 200 marine invertebrates.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, The Florida Aquarium unveiled The Tide Pool during its grand opening celebration. This new attraction is a 60-foot-long, 4,000-gallon cold-water touch habitat, making it one of the few of its kind on Florida’s west coast. With over 200 marine invertebrates, The Tide Pool offers visitors the opportunity to interact with and explore these creatures, a significant increase from the previous exhibit, No Bone Zone. This new addition provides a unique and educational experience for guests, enhancing the aquarium's offerings.

data.title: Nicole Perlroth from Ballistic Ventures to deliver Black Hat USA 2025 keynote, focusing on cybersecurity threats.
data.description: Ballistic Ventures, a venture capital firm based in San Francisco, will shine a light on critical cybersecurity threats through its partners, advisors, and portfolio companies. Specializing in funding and nurturing entrepreneurs and innovations in this sector, the firm aims to address the most pressing issues. The announcement was made on August 1, 2025.

data.title: Cop nabbed for stealing 50 BTC from seized wallet after blockchain tracking exposes his crime.
data.description: Using blockchain tracking, investigators were able to trace the theft of 50 bitcoins by a police officer, leading to his arrest and prosecution for the crime.

data.title: HKMA finds Hong Kong SMEs report stable credit conditions in Q2 2025, with slight ease decline for credit approvals.
data.description: According to the latest survey released by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) experienced stable credit conditions in the second quarter of 2025. However, there was a slight decrease in the perceived ease of credit approval during the same period. This indicates that SMEs may have found it slightly harder to secure credit during this time. Overall, the findings suggest that while credit conditions remained steady, there was a slight bump in the road when it came to accessing credit for SMEs in Hong Kong during Q2 2025.

data.title: JF Group acquires Maverick Petroleum Services in Arizona, expanding operations; Maverick specializes in petroleum equipment; -100 characters
data.description: In Morrisville, North Carolina, the JF Group (JF) has successfully acquired Maverick Petroleum Services, a renowned petroleum service contractor located in Arizona. Maverick Petroleum Services is known for its expertise in installing, maintaining, and repairing petroleum handling equipment, Point-of-Sale (POS) systems, and conducting environmental testing. JF, a prominent figure in fueling infrastructure, petroleum equipment distribution, service, general contracting, and construction services on a national scale, is excited to integrate the capabilities of Maverick Petroleum Services into their operations. This acquisition marks a strategic move for JF as they expand their portfolio and enhance their service offerings in the petroleum industry.

The Russian Federation is encouraged by the United States' openness to continue an honest and mutually respectful dialogue, Lavrov said.

data.title: Washington Trust wins Exemplary Worksite Health Award from BCBSRI for 9th year, in partnership with Chamber.
data.description: In Westerly, Rhode Island, on August 1, 2025, it was announced that Washington Trust has received the Exemplary Worksite Health Award from Blue Cross & Blue Shield of Rhode Island and the Greater Providence Chamber of Commerce for the ninth consecutive year. This recognition is a testament to the company's successful health programs aimed at promoting employee well-being. The award highlights Washington Trust's commitment to creating a healthy work environment and fostering wellness initiatives. It underscores the company's dedication to the health and wellness of its employees.

data.title: Halifax Humane Society partners with NBCUniversal and Hill's Pet Nutrition for "Clear the Shelters" campaign. Fees waived for pitbull-type dogs in August. Second Shot Event on August 4-5.
data.description: During August, the Dolly's Dream Program will be waiving fees for all Pit Bull-type dogs. Additionally, a Second Shot Event scheduled for August 4-5 will showcase adoptable dogs through exquisite photography. This initiative is spearheaded by Halifax Humane Society in partnership with NBCUniversal and Hill's Pet Nutrition for the 11th consecutive year. The program aims to promote adoptions and raise awareness around these dogs. The event will take place in Daytona Beach, Florida.

data.title: Coface SA discloses total voting rights and shares: July 31, 2025. Key numbers undisclosed.
data.description: COFACE SA has revealed the total number of voting rights and shares in its capital as of July 31, 2025. The disclosure includes the precise figures pertaining to the voting rights held and shares in circulation. This information is crucial for stakeholders and investors as it provides transparency and insight into the company's governance structure. It allows for a better understanding of the distribution of power and ownership within COFACE SA, aiding in informed decision-making and assessment of the company's performance and market position.
